title: Experimental/Assay design
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"b4rmd","text":"This protocol details the experimental / Assay design of the PCR and ddPCR process.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Avoid (>3) repeats of Gs and Cs. Balanced base distribution.
Melting temperature (Tm): between 50 °C - 65 °C , within 5 °C of each other. Tm of primer pairs within 5 °C .
Product length: PCR: 200-1000 base pairs (can be as long as 2-3k bp if needed) ddPCR: 50-250 base pairs (optimal 80-120 bp)
Tools: Primer-BLAST (NCBI), Primer3web, OligoCalc (Properties Calculator) Ordering in IDT: Custom DNA oligos
More Cs than Gs in probe.
Tools: Primer-BLAST (NCBI), Primer3web Ordering in IDT: PrimeTimeTM qPCR Probes (5’ FAM/ZEN/3’ Iowa Black FQ)
creator: Claire D Clelland
